creator: obrien@Nuxi.cs.ucdavis.edu
text:
xlbiff is an improved xbiff.  Regular xbiff lets you know when you have
	mail but not what it is.  Xlbiff lets you preview the headers of 
	new mail to decide if you want to read it immediately.


	Note that maybe ${WRKDIR}/xlbiff.form should be installed somewhere.
	But I not sure where to place it in the ${PREFIX} tree concidering
	that pretty much means the /usr/X11R6 tree.

Fix: 

uploaded to freefall:/incoming as xlbiff-portball.tgz
How-To-Repeat: 
	n/a
